who: procurement teams in accounting firms processing 5–15 vendor contracts/month
offer: For procurement teams in accounting firms processing 5–15 vendor contracts/month, missed contract renewals cause service interruptions. We provide timely alerts instead of manual tracking of contract dates using spreadsheets.
problem: Missed contract renewals leading to service interruptions and potential penalties.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for procurement teams
Share insights on Indie Hackers related to workflows
DM outreach to procurement teams with demo video
Engage in community forums for procurement tools
try_it: Let users try manual entry and 30-day alert system
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
